family_summary: Cross-checks that a CEF phase declares a magnetic model in its structure if and only if its endmembers or interactions carry magnetic parameters.

rules.purpose: Flags a CEF phase whose structure declares a magnetic model while no endmember or interaction carries magnetic parameters (M, BML, TCL).
Flags a CEF phase that carries magnetic parameters (M, BML, TCL) while its structure declares no magnetic model.
